name: Georgia Peach Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the sugar, flour, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Gradually add milk to the dry ingredients while stirring constantly until fully combined.
3. Cook the mixture over boiling water, stirring continuously, until it begins to thicken.
4. Remove from heat and gently fold in the well-beaten egg yolks and butter, stirring until smooth.
5. Stir in lemon juice and allow the filling to cool slightly.
6. Arrange a cup of sliced peaches at the bottom of the prepared pie shell.
7. Pour the cooled filling over the peaches and add the remaining slices on top.
8. Chill the pie thoroughly before serving.
9. Top with sweetened whipped cream.
